_comment: TEMPLATE. The REAL file lives OUT of the repo (default ~/.config/CatchChallenger/ia-settings.json; override CC_IA_SETTINGS) so a remote/router URL that embeds infrastructure IP is never committed. Copy this there and edit. Use EITHER 'ollama_host' (one default backend) OR 'ollama_backends' (a multi-host table). The OLLAMA_HOST env var overrides both. Delete/omit the file to use only the local backend (http://127.0.0.1:11434).
_ollama_host_comment: Single default backend: a local daemon, a remote Ollama daemon (http://[<ipv6>]:11434), or an Ollama-API-compatible PHP router (http://[<ipv6>], port 80 / index.php) that routes to the optimized instance. Bracket IPv6 hosts.
_ollama_api_comment: Wire API the backend speaks: 'ollama' (default - native /api/chat with a messages array, e.g. a local/remote ollamad) or 'router' (the PHP front controller: one POST of {model, prompt, preprompt} + Bearer, reply {response,...}). Same as the CC_OLLAMA_API env var.
_ollama_think_comment: Reasoning control for thinking models. Omit/null = leave the model default (safe for non-thinking models). false = skip the slow reasoning tokens (REQUIRED for a thinking model like gemma4:26b - it otherwise burns ~1300 tokens thinking before a ~30-token answer). Same as CC_OLLAMA_THINK.
_ollama_token_comment: Bearer token when the backend is behind an authenticating proxy (the router's index.php requires one). Leave empty for a plain local daemon. A SECRET - keep it only in this out-of-repo file (or the OLLAMA_API_KEY / OLLAMA_TOKEN env var), never in the repo.
_router_ssh_comment: Free-text note (ignored by the tools): SSH/deploy coordinates of the PHP router source, e.g. 'root@<host> -p <port> /var/www/html/'. Keep real coords only in the out-of-repo copy.
_ollama_backends_comment: Multi-host table (overrides ollama_host). A bare string is a backend URL; an object may pin models to a backend. Each model routes to the SAME backend every run so it stays warm and a panel spreads across hosts.
